positive: A minimalist, highly stylized depiction of a celestial forest at twilight. The scene features silhouetted trees with bioluminescent, glowing undergrowth and ethereal mist swirling between the trunks. The main subject is a single, oversized, glowing moth fluttering near the center. The style should be reminiscent of Art Nouveau and modern geometric linework, emphasizing clean, graphic lines and negative space. Use a limited color palette dominated by deep indigo, sapphire blue, glowing teal, and stark black. The lighting is dramatic, emanating only from the bioluminescence, creating strong contrast and deep shadows. The composition must be perfectly balanced and symmetrical, centered for optimal placement on apparel. High contrast, intricate detailing, vector art quality, flat graphic illustration, perfect symmetry, perfect silhouette.
